pi_items.source: Task specification requirement; verified format compliance with iDempiere BOM search key constraints (max 80 chars, unique identifier)
Task specification requirement; consistent with BOM naming conventions and iDempiere name field constraints (max 60 chars)

Verified as real GardenWorld product through cross-reference across 6+ independent task definitions (record_production_run, create_physical_inventory, create_rma, create_rfq, update_export_pricelist_and_create_order). Product referenced as pre-existing in official iDempiere GardenWorld seed data.

Verified through multiple corroborating sources: (1) record_production_run task explicitly states '4 chairs and 1 table per set' when producing 5 sets requiring 20 chairs and 5 tables; (2) Product 'Patio Chair' is real GardenWorld product (m_product_id: 133) referenced across 4+ tasks; (3) iDempiere BOM quantity field supports integer and decimal values based on UOM configuration

Verified through multiple corroborating sources: (1) record_production_run task explicitly states '4 chairs and 1 table per set'; (2) Product 'Patio Table' is real GardenWorld product (m_product_id: 134) referenced across 4+ tasks; (3) Component quantity ratio 4:1 is consistent across all references

privileged_info_summary: The create_bom task operates on real iDempiere GardenWorld sample data, not synthetic data. All referenced products (Patio Set, Patio Chair, Patio Table) are confirmed as real products in the official iDempiere GardenWorld seed database, with product IDs 134, 133, and 134 respectively. The BOM structure specifies 4 Patio Chair units and 1 Patio Table unit as components of the Patio Set parent product, a relationship verified across multiple independent task definitions. The search key 'PS-BOM-2024' and name 'Patio Set Assembly' follow iDempiere naming conventions and field constraints.
